description: This file defines a React component for the 'Rules' page of an insurance fraud detection platform. It manages CRUD operations for fraud detection rules, including creating, editing, toggling active status, deleting, filtering by category, and displaying rules in a grid layout. It interacts with an API module to fetch and update rule data, and uses React state hooks to manage UI state.

methods.name: loadRules
methods.description: Fetches rules from the API based on current category filter and updates component state.

methods.name: handleSaveRule
methods.description: Handles form submission to create or update a fraud rule.

methods.name: handleToggle
methods.description: Toggles the active status of a rule.

methods.name: handleDelete
methods.description: Deletes a rule after user confirmation.

methods.name: getCategoryBadge
methods.description: Returns badge class based on rule category.
